summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TrustOffice subscription system with soft gating via watermarks. All backend APIs and frontend UI features verified working correctly.

issues: React warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' - BrowserRouter/LoginPage setState issue. Cosmetic, non-blocking.

backend_api: POST /api/auth/register - New user gets 14-day trial with status='trialing'
GET /api/subscription - Returns correct plan_type, status, days_remaining, is_active
POST /api/subscription/create-checkout (monthly) - Returns valid Stripe checkout URL
POST /api/subscription/create-checkout (annual) - Returns valid Stripe checkout URL
POST /api/subscription/cancel - Returns proper error for trial users without Stripe subscription
POST /api/subscription/reactivate - Returns proper error for trial users without Stripe subscription
GET /api/minutes/{id}/pdf - Accessible for trialing users (soft gating allows access with watermark)
PUT /api/user/preferences - Trialing users can toggle hide_watermark
PUT /api/user/preferences - Backend validates subscription for watermark removal
Expired user gets 402 on protected endpoints (/api/trusts)
Expired user can create checkout session to resubscribe
frontend_ui: Login page loads and accepts credentials
Settings page shows 'Billing & Subscription' section with 'MANAGE SUBSCRIPTION' button
Settings/Billing page shows current subscription status ('Free Trial', 'TRIAL - 13 DAYS LEFT')
Settings/Billing shows trial expiry date and days remaining
Plan selection shows Monthly ($79/month) and Annual ($790/year) options
SUBSCRIBE TO MONTHLY and SUBSCRIBE TO ANNUAL buttons are clickable
Minutes page shows PDF export buttons for each minute record
PDF export modal appears with download option
Settings page has 'PDF Settings' section with 'Hide TrustOffice Watermark' toggle
Watermark toggle shows 'Available for paid subscribers only' note
Toggling watermark preference shows 'Watermark hidden' confirmation toast

critical_code_review_comments: Backend should_show_watermark() helper correctly checks: 1) subscription status (active/trialing), 2) trial expiry, 3) user preference hide_watermark
Backend check_subscription_active() dependency correctly returns 402 for expired/canceled subscriptions
Stripe checkout session creation works correctly with test keys
PDF endpoints use soft gating (allows access with watermark) instead of hard gating (blocking access)
User preferences API correctly validates subscription status before allowing hide_watermark=true
Frontend billing page provides clear subscription status and upgrade path
seed_data_creation: Tests created temporary users with unique email addresses for new user trial testing - no cleanup needed as these are test accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription system with soft gating via watermarks is fully functional. Key features verified: 1) New users automatically get 14-day trial with status='trialing', 2) Stripe checkout creates valid checkout URLs, 3) PDF export is accessible for all users (soft gating) but shows 'Generated by TrustOffice • Subscribe to remove watermark' for non-subscribed/trial users, 4) Active/trialing users can toggle watermark off via Settings > PDF Settings, 5) Expired users get 402 on protected routes but can access subscription/auth endpoints to resubscribe. Stripe is in TEST MODE - checkout URLs work but payments aren't real without test card 4242424242424242.

subscription_flow.checkout_creation: Returns valid https://checkout.stripe.com URLs for monthly/annual plans
subscription_flow.status_check: GET /subscription returns subscription_id, user_id, plan_type, status, is_active, days_remaining
subscription_flow.cancel_reactivate: Returns proper errors when no Stripe subscription exists

soft_gating_watermark.pdf_access: All users can export PDFs (soft gating, not hard blocking)
soft_gating_watermark.watermark_logic: should_show_watermark() checks subscription status + trial expiry + user preference
soft_gating_watermark.watermark_text: Generated by TrustOffice • Subscribe to remove watermark
soft_gating_watermark.toggle_setting: Settings > PDF Settings > Hide TrustOffice Watermark

stripe_test_mode_note: Stripe is in TEST mode. Checkout sessions create valid URLs but actual payment requires Stripe checkout UI with test card 4242424242424242. Webhook endpoint won't receive events without Stripe CLI forwarding.
